title: Using AI Agents as Your Operations Team
excerpt: AI playing the roles of product manager, copywriter, and customer service
content:
Content Agent: writing and publishing. Data Agent: traffic analysis. Customer Service Agent: auto-replies to FAQs. Operations Agent: revenue tracking and alerts. One person plus four AI Agents equals a complete operations team. This isn't a concept — it's the reality AgentClaw is putting into practice.
